title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sasken Technologies Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sasken Technologies Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sasken Technologies Holdings Services:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies Holdings Services!
